info.name: GymHubCollection
info.description: Complete API collection for GymHub backend (Spring Boot, port 8085). Base URL: http://localhost:8085. After login/register, the JWT is auto-saved to {{token}} and used as Bearer auth across all requests.

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description: Register, login, add role, get current user profile

item.description: Specialist profile, service axes, and tool management

item.name: 🤝 Specialist Relationships

body.raw:
{
  "specialistProfileId": {{specialistId}},
  "relationshipType": "ENTITY_CONTRACT",
  "proposedStartDate": "2026-07-01",
  "paymentOwner": "GYM",
  "activationOwner": "GYM",
  "serviceOwner": "GYM",
  "packageOwner": "GYM",
  "canSpecialistSellToGymClients": true,
  "canSpecialistSellToNonGymClients": false,
  "gymPatternPolicy": "RECOMMENDED_ONLY",
  "mandatoryPatternsApply": false,
  "recommendedPatternsVisible": true,
  "notes": "Interested in a full-time contract starting July"
}

{
  "paymentOwner": "GYM",
  "activationOwner": "GYM",
  "serviceOwner": "SPECIALIST",
  "packageOwner": "GYM",
  "canSpecialistSellToGymClients": true,
  "canSpecialistSellToNonGymClients": true,
  "gymPatternPolicy": "MANDATORY_APPLIES",
  "mandatoryPatternsApply": true,
  "recommendedPatternsVisible": true,
  "notes": "Updated terms after negotiation"
}

item.description: Gym ↔ Specialist relationship contracts — initiated from either side
